goal: Add a side-effect-free permit-prep builder for BPK-081 approved runtime patch decisions, producing permit request metadata for a later task while keeping permit issuance, execution, patch application, server mutation, route mount, orchestrator, providers, DB, GitHub, writes, packages, workflows, and deployment out of scope.
scope_out: Do not issue permits, apply patches, mount routes, call orchestrator, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, write files, deploy, change workflows, change packages, or enable execution.
claims: Approved runtime decisions can be converted to permit-prep metadata without issuing a permit.
Ready BPK-081 decision gate and permit prep refs are required.
Execution and patch application remain false.
assumptions: Actual permit issuance and runtime patch application require later task locks.
dod: Approved, missing permit prep ref, and rejected or blocked decision cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Permit issuance, route mount, execution, orchestrator, provider, DB, GitHub, write, deployment, package, or workflow changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-081 converted runtime dry-run evidence into explicit operator decisions without applying patches.
